report_name: Job Seekers Targeted in Phishing Scam Impersonating Palo Alto Networks Recruiters

threat_actors.name: Unidentified Phishing Actor
threat_actors.description: A financially motivated threat actor conducting a phishing campaign impersonating Palo Alto Networks recruiters. The actor uses social engineering to trick job seekers into paying for fake CV formatting services.
threat_actors.goals: To defraud job seekers of money by tricking them into paying for fake 'CV formatting' services.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: The attackers used highly personalized spear-phishing emails to make initial contact with senior-level professionals, impersonating recruiters.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing for Information
attack_patterns.description: The campaign used pretexting, a form of phishing for information, by creating a fabricated scenario about a CV failing an ATS scan to manipulate the victim into paying a fee.

attack_patterns.name: Gather Victim Identity Information
attack_patterns.description: Attackers scraped LinkedIn for information on senior-level professionals to use in their highly personalized phishing lures.

attack_patterns.name: Acquire Infrastructure: Domains
attack_patterns.description: The attackers used typosquatted domains, such as 'paloaltonetworks-careers.com', to make their phishing emails appear legitimate.

attack_patterns.name: Impersonation
attack_patterns.description: The attackers impersonated Palo Alto Networks employees (recruiters) and a professional service provider ('CV expert') as a key element of the social engineering scam.

identities.name: Palo Alto Networks
identities.description: A cybersecurity company whose brand and recruiters were impersonated in a phishing scam to defraud job seekers.

identities.name: Senior-level professionals
identities.description: A class of individuals targeted by the phishing campaign, with personal and professional data scraped from LinkedIn to create convincing lures.

identities.name: LinkedIn
identities.description: Social media platform used by the attackers for reconnaissance to scrape data on potential targets.

infrastructure.name: Typosquatted Recruitment Phishing Domain
infrastructure.description: A typosquatted domain, such as 'paloaltonetworks-careers.com', was used to host the phishing campaign and send emails impersonating company recruiters.

indicators.name: Palo Alto Networks Recruiter Impersonation Domain
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Palo Alto Networks Recruiter Impersonation Domain
id: 2b1a3c4d-5e6f-4a7b-8c9d-0e1f2a3b4c5d
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to a typosquatted domain used in a phishing campaign impersonating Palo Alto Networks recruiters.
references:
  - https://blog.knowbe4.com/phishing-campaign-impersonates-palo-alto-networks-recruiters
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-09
tags:
  - attack.t1566
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1583.001
falsepositives:
  - Unlikely, but could be legitimate if the company registers such a domain for marketing.
level: high
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|endswith:
      - 'paloaltonetworks-careers.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to a typosquatted domain used in a phishing campaign impersonating Palo Alto Networks recruiters.

indicators.name: Recruitment Scam Lure Keywords
indicators.pattern:
title: Recruitment Scam Lure Keywords
id: 8d7c6b5a-4f3e-4d2c-1b0a-9e8d7c6b5a4f
status: experimental
description: Detects emails containing keywords associated with a recruitment scam where victims are told their CV failed an ATS scan and are referred to a paid formatting service.
references:
  - https://blog.knowbe4.com/phishing-campaign-impersonates-palo-alto-networks-recruiters
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-09
tags:
  - attack.t1598
  - attack.t1566
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate discussions about CV formatting and ATS systems.
level: medium
logsource:
  category: email
detection:
  selection_keywords:
    Subject|contains:
      - 'CV'
      - 'resume'
      - 'application'
      - 'Palo Alto Networks'
    Body|contains:
      - 'ATS'
      - 'Applicant Tracking System'
      - 'formatting error'
      - 'CV expert'
      - 'rejected'
  condition: all of selection_keywords
indicators.description: Detects emails containing a combination of keywords related to a recruitment scam involving fake CV formatting errors for an Applicant Tracking System (ATS).

relationships.source_name: Palo Alto Networks Recruiter Impersonation Domain
